data.body:
Ingredients:
1 1/2 lb fresh salmon
2 Tbsp olive oil
1 tsp lemon zest
2 Tbsp lemon juice
2 cloves garlic
1 tsp salt
1/4 tsp dill (1/2 tsp if fresh)
1/2 tsp oregano
1/2 tsp crushed red pepper flakes 
1/2 tsp sumac (substitute: 1/4 tsp lemon zest)
Lemon wedges to serve
data.author: did:plc:caoxns37s43ws5yzxih225d2

data.body:
Preparation:
Simply mix all the above ingredients together, grating the garlic into the bowl. Squeezing as much of the water out of the cucumber as you can really makes a difference. If you skip this step your sauce will separate.

data.body: The way this works: when you "instantiate" the prefab into your scene, the script makes the new node no longer an instance (i.e. "Make Local"), and makes all its resources unique. Finally, the script deletes itself, so you're just left with a pre-configured, ready-to-tweak node.
